notes: json_typeof identifies top-level objects
json_typeof identifies top-level arrays
canonical sb.json.typeof identifies top-level booleans
json_extract extracts a scalar fragment
json_extract missing path returns null json_document
canonical sb.json.extract extracts a scalar fragment through the same engine helper without alias as execution authority
Generic SQL/JSON exists routes to document path existence helper
SQL/JSON exists signature returns false for absent top-level member
Lowercase document/jsonpath spelling routes to the same helper
Generic JSON_VALUE extracts a scalar fragment
Full SQL/JSON JSON_VALUE spelling extracts a string fragment
Missing JSON value path returns null json_document
Generic JSON_QUERY extracts an object fragment
Lowercase JSON query extracts an array fragment
json_set inserts a missing top-level member
json_set replaces an existing top-level member
json_remove removes a present top-level member
json_remove leaves absent member documents unchanged
json_replace updates a present top-level member
json_replace does not create absent members
json_insert inserts only when a top-level member is absent
json_insert leaves an existing top-level member unchanged
jsonb_set replaces an existing top-level member
jsonb_set with create_missing false leaves absent member unchanged
json_array_length counts top-level array elements
json_array_length returns zero for an empty JSON array
json_array_length refuses a non-array document
jsonb_array_length shares the JSON array counter
jsonb_array_length returns zero for an empty JSONB-compatible array
json_build_array emits a JSON document array
json_build_array accepts zero arguments
json_build_object emits an object from key/value pairs
Odd json_build_object arity refuses exactly
jsonb_build_array emits a JSON-compatible document array
jsonb_build_object emits a JSON-compatible document object
to_json JSON-escapes text input
to_json converts SQL null input to JSON null literal
to_jsonb preserves document input as a JSON literal
to_jsonb serializes numeric input as a JSON number
jsonb_typeof shares canonical JSON type classifier
jsonb_typeof identifies top-level arrays
json_object emits a bounded JSON object from key/value pairs
jsonb_object emits a JSON-compatible bounded object from key/value pairs
json_object_keys returns a scalar JSON array of top-level keys in this bounded slice
document form shares json_object_keys bounded scalar key array semantics
jsonb_object_keys returns a scalar JSON array of top-level keys in this bounded slice
document form shares jsonb_object_keys bounded scalar key array semantics
json_array_elements returns top-level elements as a scalar JSON array in this bounded slice
document form shares bounded scalar JSON array element semantics
json_array_elements_text returns element fragments as JSON strings in this bounded scalar slice
json_each returns key/value objects in a scalar JSON array for this bounded slice
document form shares bounded scalar json_each semantics
json_each_text returns value fragments as JSON strings in this bounded scalar slice
document form shares bounded scalar json_each_text semantics
jsonb_insert inserts a missing top-level object member in this bounded slice
document form leaves existing top-level object members unchanged
jsonb_path_exists returns true for a present bounded top-level path
document form returns false for an absent bounded path
jsonb_path_match returns true when the bounded path resolves to JSON true
document form returns false when the bounded path does not resolve to JSON true
jsonb_path_query returns the bounded path fragment
document form returns the bounded path scalar fragment
jsonb_path_query_array wraps the bounded path fragment in a JSON array
jsonb_path_query_first returns the first bounded path fragment

document form shares deterministic pretty formatting
